title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated,' will be announced soon
summary_full: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: positive
